basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Senior Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Roorkee. A total of 1 Senior Project Associate vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctorate (PhD) degree awarded in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Life Sciences/Medical Biotechnology in the area of Obesity and Nanobiotechnology.
qualification.details: Senior Project Associate: Doctorate (PhD) degree awarded in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Life Sciences/ Medical Biotechnology in the area of Obesity and Nanobiotechnology. Candidates having prior experience in: handling and culturing of mammalian cell lines (especially browning of adipocytes); synthesizing and characterization of drug loaded nanoparticles; analyzing the function and cell signaling, developing animal models of obesity, various molecular biology techniques and other analytical techniques like western blots, RT-PCR, immunoprecipitation assays will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 57,000/- per month + HRA 10% (@ Rs. 5,700/- per month)
salary_details.details: Senior Project Associate: Rs. 57,000/- per month + HRA 10% (@ Rs. 5,700/- per month)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Vacancy 2026
IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Senior Project Associate: Doctorate (PhD) degree awarded in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Life Sciences/ Medical Biotechnology in the area of Obesity and Nanobiotechnology. Candidates having prior experience in: handling and culturing of mammalian cell lines (especially browning of adipocytes); synthesizing and characterization of drug loaded nanoparticles; analyzing the function and cell signaling, developing animal models of obesity, various molecular biology techniques and other analytical techniques like western blots, RT-PCR, immunoprecipitation assays will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the Senior Project Associate position at IIT Roorkee is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Doctorate (PhD) degree awarded in Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Life Sciences, or Medical Biotechnology, specifically in the area of Obesity and Nanobiotechnology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 57,000/- per month, along with HRA of 10% (which amounts to Rs. 5,700/- per month).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. The application, along with a detailed CV and attested copies of certificates, should be sent to the office of the Principal Investigator.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is through email. Candidates must send their applications as a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: While a PhD is the primary qualification, prior experience in handling mammalian cell lines, nanoparticle synthesis, cell signaling analysis, animal models of obesity, and molecular biology techniques is preferred.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Senior Project Associate in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview. The tentative date for the interview is in August 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
